rationale: The papers have strong conceptual overlap: both study impulsive choice in food-related consumer contexts, with the cited paper offering a specific motivational mechanism (regulatory focus) and the citing paper positioning its contribution against prior trait/context explanations of impulsivity. Given the citing note’s stated research gap and the cited title/topic (“Impulsive Eaters’ Choice Behaviors”), this citation is plausibly a substantive prior-theory/comparison source rather than an incidental mention. With an exact DOI match, this pair should be retained for full relation judgment.
